concerns.text: The specification adds extensive functional requirements (e.g., FR-005a cluster‑adjusted GLMM, FR-019 Fisher’s exact test, FR-008 synthetic validation dataset, FR-006 reproducibility package, FR-010 HTML dashboard) that were not mentioned in the original idea, which only called for auditing public A/B test summaries and reporting the prevalence of inconsistencies. This constitutes scope over‑reach.
